target.transportPath: Resolve mandatory WSP-C-001 through the connectionless WSP-CL-C-001 alternative. Connection-oriented rows remain conditional and activate WTP:MCF.

governingSource.selectedDefinition: MCF = all mandatory client features of the specification SCR
governingSource.dependencyGrammar: SCR requirement expressions use AND/OR with AND taking precedence

authority.extractionMethod: Row identifiers, first-line feature labels, status, actor, order, and dependency expressions were parsed from the hash-locked effective SCR table text. Private PDFs and full text remain outside Git.

mapping.assessmentNote: Native fetch and session types support a connectionless path, but the strict Class C mode capability and its WDP dependency closure are not yet machine-declared.

testEvidence.limitation: Project-authored fixture; not derived from the WAP-203 effective table or protocol vectors.

obligations.dependencyExpression: WDP:MCF AND WSP-CL-C-003 AND WSP-CL-C-004 AND WSP-CL-C-005 AND WSP-CL-C-006 AND WSP-CL-C-007 AND WSP-CL-C-020
